name: sales
description: Sales productivity plugin for Roots.Tech — Thai Odoo ERP implementation firm. Prospect, prep for calls, analyze requirements, manage pipeline, and prepare government bids. Based on Anthropic's official sales plugin, extended with Odoo-specific skills, Thai market context, and Google Workspace connectors. Includes TOR Response Factory (9 skills + 2 agents + 10 registers) for government bid compliance, scoring matrix optimization, and G0–G6 gate-enforced pipeline.
